className: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center gap-16

src: var a = ctx.animate({ from:{scale:1}, to:{scale:1.4}, duration:30, easing:'spring-gentle' }); ctx.getNode('once').scale(a.scale); var b = ctx.animate({ from:{scale:1}, to:{scale:1.4}, duration:30, repeat:-1, repeatDelay:10, easing:'ease-in-out' }); ctx.getNode('loop').scale(b.scale); var c = ctx.animate({ from:{scale:1}, to:{scale:1.4}, duration:30, repeat:-1, yoyo:true, easing:'ease-in-out' }); ctx.getNode('yoyo').scale(c.scale);
